title: Wano’s Long Night Begins to Break
description: On pages 16–17, this part focuses on Unknown person #16, Kozuki Alliance as Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.
scene: Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What in the world is he... this pure white trans formation...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's coated with 'armament and conqueror's haki... and he can influence anything around him with his ability...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He fights with such freedom... so versatile I've never seen anything like it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There is no one in this world capable of taking me down!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: I'm having the time of my life!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 7 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
